author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Added 6 edge-case tests for correlate in ferray-stats/src/correlation.rs: single-element full/valid (15.0 = 3*5), identical-arrays shape+finiteness, all-zeros yields all-zeros, [1.0] kernel is identity in same mode, empty input errors. 253 stats tests pass.

While writing these noticed ferray's correlate is actually computing convolution (indexing 'a[i-j] * v[j]' is the convolution kernel-flip, not cross-correlation 'a[i+j] * v[j]'). Filed as #722 medium-priority bug. The edge-case tests don't depend on the formula so they're stable either way.
